credits: Aldebaran sector was designed by Randy Dorman. Stellar positions were developed by Joe D. Fugate Sr. and appear in The MegaTraveller Alien, Volume 2: Solomani & Aslan (Digest Group Publications, 1991).

allegiances.SoFr: Solomani Confederation, Third Reformed French Confederate Republic
allegiances.SoQu: Solomani Confederation, Grand United States of Quesada
